Data Protection

Privacy Policy
Last updated: March 2026
1. Information We Collect
We collect information you provide when creating an account (name, email, username), completing tasks (proof images, completion codes), and making withdrawal requests (wallet addresses).
2. How We Use Your Information
Your information is used to process task submissions and payments, prevent fraud, improve our platform, and communicate updates. We do not sell your data to third parties.
3. Data Storage
All data is stored securely. Passwords are stored as hashes and never in plaintext.
4. Your Rights
You may request access, correction, or deletion of your data at any time. Contact support to exercise these rights.
5. Contact
For privacy concerns contact: support@onewall.app
Terms of Service
Last updated: March 2026
1. Acceptance
By using OneWall you agree to these Terms.
2. Eligibility
You must be 18 years or older. All information you provide must be accurate.
3. Task Rules
Tasks must be completed honestly. Fraudulent proofs or bot usage will result in account suspension.
4. Payments
Earnings are credited after admin approval. Withdrawals are processed within 1-24 hours.
5. Liability
OneWall is not liable for indirect damages. Our total liability is limited to your available balance.
Data Protection
Last updated: March 2026
Data We Hold
Account info, transaction records, support history, and proof screenshots for task verification.
Retention
Account data is held while your account is active. Payment records are retained for 7 years for compliance. Screenshots are deleted after 90 days.
Security
Row-level security on all database tables. HTTPS-only. Passwords stored as hashes. Regular security audits.
